query: SELECT id, title, code, description FROM courses WHERE code LIKE 'GED%' OR title LIKE '%GED%' OR title LIKE '%Bridge%' ORDER BY code;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT id, title, code, description FROM courses WHERE code LIKE 'GED%' OR title LIKE '%GED%' OR title LIKE '%Bridge%' ORDER BY code;

rows.title: GED Language Arts

rows.title: GED Mathematics
rows.description: Comprehensive preparation for the GED Mathematics test covering algebra, geometry, and data analysis.

rows.title: GED Science

rows.title: GED Social Studies
